basics.name: lmever
basics.label: AI Agent / DevOps / Technical Support
basics.summary: I build practical AI-agent and automation systems, with experience across enterprise technical support, DevOps operations, data workflows, and business-facing IT delivery.

work.summary: Support merchant API and AI Skill integrations while maintaining observability for overseas financial channels.
highlights: Built Datadog-based monitoring and custom log rules for full-link issue detection.

work.summary: Managed finance information-system delivery, operations, data governance, and automation opportunities for business teams.
highlights: Coordinated requirements with IT teams and supported iterative system improvements.
Maintained SAP, BI, and reporting workflows for financial data synchronization.

work.summary: Handled global endpoint support, Microsoft ecosystem troubleshooting, and enterprise endpoint deployment operations.
highlights: Maintained SOPs and knowledge-base articles for repeatable troubleshooting and compliance workflows.
Used SCCM, WSUS, and Intune for standardized imaging, software rollout, and update operations.
Improved endpoint update efficiency through conflict analysis and workflow optimization.

projects.name: Enterprise Q&A Agent
projects.summary: A private enterprise knowledge assistant built with LangChain, LangGraph, Milvus, and DeepSeek, focused on document cleaning, chunking, retrieval optimization, and multi-turn task orchestration.

projects.name: Music Generation Agent
projects.summary: An end-to-end music-generation agent that connects instruction understanding, task decomposition, model invocation, and audio fusion across multiple music models.

projects.name: ANTLR-based Language Interpreter
projects.summary: A DSL interpreter project covering grammar design, lexer/parser files, AST structures, and separation between syntax analysis and backend logic.
